name: Best Care Transit Svc
registry_source: Illinois Secretary of State Business Entity Search (apps.ilsos.gov)
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). FMCSA SAFER keyword search for 'BEST CARE TRANSIT' returned no records. IL SOS business entity search blocked to automated lookup (HTTP 403); no matching entity surfaced via Bizapedia/OpenCorporates/Google. Source record has blank hq/address. Several similarly named carriers exist (Best Care Transport Inc USDOT 2951987; Best Care Transportation LLC USDOT 2035334) but none confirmed as match for this IL entity. Likely a small intrastate NEMT/transport operator; manual ILSOS lookup required to verify entity_status and inc_date.
